lume — vendored Swift wrapper around Apple's Virtualization.framework

Upstream:     https://github.com/trycua/cua
Subpath:      libs/lume
Pinned at:    d422294b848afec99b979ac1229446c83fa44807
Lume version: 0.3.9 (per libs/lume/VERSION)
Wells tag:    v0.3.9-wells.1 (vendored copy + 2 wells-team patches)
License:      MIT — see vendor/lume.LICENSE.md
Vendored:     2026-05-05

Upstream activity status (as of 2026-05-08): trycua merged lume into the
cua monorepo and pivoted to cua-driver work. No lume commits since
2026-03-27 (6+ weeks). Open lume issues piling up. We treat the vendored
copy as effectively forked — we maintain patches at vendor/lume.patches/
and may publish a real fork at peteknowsai/lume (or similar) when we
need to share the patched binary externally. See Phase B.1 in
docs/MVP-PLAN.md for the migration history.

Active patches (applied at build time):
  vendor/lume.patches/swift/0001-add-mount-to-RunVMRequest.patch
    Adds `mount: String?` to the HTTP /run request body so wells can
    pass cidata.iso for cloud-init via the API. Without this, wells
    falls back to spawning `lume run` as a subprocess; those VMs never
    enter lume serve's SharedVM cache, breaking pause/resume.
  vendor/lume.patches/swift/0002-fix-SIGINT-process-group-leak.patch
    VM.swift:451-454 used kill(pid, SIGINT) which propagates back to
    lume serve via process-group semantics, killing it with exit 130.
    Switched to SIGTERM; the existing wait+SIGKILL escalation handles
    non-graceful shutdown.

Why vendored: see docs/decisions/0001-engine-lume.md.

Modification policy:
- Don't edit files under vendor/lume/ in place.
- If patches are needed, add them under vendor/lume.patches/ and apply
  during scripts/build-lume.sh.
- To re-vendor at a newer commit, re-run the sparse checkout pattern:
    git clone --filter=blob:none --no-checkout --depth=1 \
      https://github.com/trycua/cua.git /tmp/cua-staging
    cd /tmp/cua-staging
    git sparse-checkout init --cone
    git sparse-checkout set libs/lume
    git checkout HEAD
    cp -R libs/lume <splites>/vendor/lume   # after rm -rf the old one
    git cat-file -p HEAD:LICENSE.md > <splites>/vendor/lume.LICENSE.md
  Then update the "Pinned at" SHA above and re-run the build.
